creator: scott-ports@tummy.com
text:
On Thu, May 15, 2008 at 09:30:46PM +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
>Maintainer of sysutils/heartbeat,
>
>Please note that PR ports/123704 has just been submitted.
>
>If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>and a committer will take care of it.
>
>The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123704

I don't see a patch, only a bug report.  I cannot duplicte the bug in my
environment.

This looks like a duplicate of
   http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/123704
